companyName.zh: 雀巢 —— 开发组合动作

summary.en: Nestlé illustrates Exploit portfolio management: the company manages mature categories through acquire, partner, improve, and divest actions rather than treating the existing business portfolio as static.
summary.zh: 雀巢展示了 Exploit 开发组合管理：公司通过收购、合作、改善和剥离等动作管理成熟品类，而不是把现有业务组合当成静态资产。

sources.label: Alexander Osterwalder, Yves Pigneur, Fred Etiemble & Alan Smith · The Invincible Company · Wiley · 2020 · Nestlé portfolio example
Nestlé investor day and public portfolio materials
